captions.01-instructions.png: Instructions explain quorum release, productive waiting tasks, recording, and recovery behavior.
captions.02-personality-pushbuttons.png: Personality lobby trial uses PsyNet push buttons with the five-point accuracy scale.
captions.03-guessing-slider-hidden-target.png: Guessing lobby trial uses a 0-10 slider and does not show the target before submission.
captions.04-guessing-feedback.png: Guessing feedback reveals target, guess, difference, and feedback label after submission.
captions.05-quorate-main-loop.png: Participant is released into the tutorial-style quorate main loop once the group is quorate.
